name: Forest Of Fear
short_description: On a mission to explore a secret island discovered by the military, your plane crashes, leaving you as the sole survivor. Now, on the Island of the Condemned, your only concern is to survive and escape at any cost.
detailed_description:
Forest Of Fear


On a mission to explore a secret island discovered by the military, your plane crashes, leaving you as the sole survivor. Now, on the Island of the Condemned, your only concern is to survive and escape at any cost.

In search of help, you come across an abandoned camp. However, instead of assistance, you discover a helicopter project. Your hope for escape depends on exploring the dense forest, sinister caves, and dark lakes in search of essential materials.


Survive:

The island is home to monsters, cave creatures, and native tribes, guardians of dark secrets. Survival is a constant challenge in the face of these dangers.


Build, Create, and Protect:

Utilize an elaborate crafting system to create vital tools and equipment. Build bases and shelters to protect yourself from the horrors of the night and the dangers of the forest.


Join Your Friends:

The game features multiplayer mode, so you and your friends can face the horrors of the Island of the Condemned together. Work as a team to survive, build shelters, and confront the dangers lurking in the forest.


Unlimited Exploration:

Explore different biomes, Dark Forests, Caves, biomes with different Creatures, etc. With a vast and dynamic open world, every decision is yours. Explore the island at your own pace, uncover hidden secrets, and determine your fate as you fight for survival.

In Forest of Fear, every step could be your last. Do you have the courage to face the terrors of the island and escape alive?

supported_languages:
English, French, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
